training_status: blast and cruise cycle since late summer prior year

benefits.description: Huge difference in muscle growth when combined with proper diet, training, sleep, and supplementation

side_effects.description: Gastrointestinal issues if dose too high - 'sitting on the porcelain throne till you empty out'

protocol_notes: No DAC variant. Emphasizes titration to avoid sides. Current protocol: 250mcg total daily (100 night, 150 morning). Uses keto/hunter-gatherer diet, L-arginine/L-ornithine, beta ecdysterone, turkesterone, creatine, electrolytes. Does sauna/steam to amplify GH/IGF-1 effects. Takes short breaks between cycles. Wholistic doctor confirmed hormone levels 'amazing' for non-steroid user. No bloating on keto diet. Additional protocols: intermittent fasting on non-workout days, pin on fasted state.
